remarks: Conveniently located just moments from the Metro-North Railroad at Glenbrook Station, this rental offers the perfect commuter location with easy access to transportation, local shops, dining, and everything Glenbrook has to offer.  This well-maintained home features private use of a sun-filled second-floor sunporch-perfect for a home office, morning coffee, or a relaxing reading nook. Additional conveniences include on-site coin-operated laundry, designated private storage space in the basement, and off-street parking for added ease.  Enjoy the best of Glenbrook living with restaurants, retail, and commuter access just moments from your doorstep.
